cards.back: A supervised learning algorithm that classifies new instances based on their similarity to existing instances in the training dataset
A variation of KNN that assigns different weights to the k nearest neighbors based on their distance from the new instance
A learning approach that relies on measuring the similarity between instances in the training dataset to make predictions
A type of supervised learning that classifies new instances based on the similarity to the most similar instance in the training dataset
A measure used to calculate the distance between two instances, often used in KNN and WKNN algorithms
